subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The verses were most eloquent and fluent, possessed of infinite charm and sweetness; their recitation brought joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی اشعار بلیغ و فصیح و در نهایت ملاحت و حلاوت بود تلاوتش سبب سرور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry
